title: eriosema macrostipulum
intro: Eriosema macrostipulum, also known as the 'Horse gram', is a type of legume plant native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriosema macrostipulum include its ability to reduce fever, treat kidney stones, and alleviate symptoms of hypertension and diabetes. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and is often consumed in its raw or roasted form as a nutritional supplement.
